bids.reasoning: At the beginning of the negotiation, I prioritize my maximum utility without the pressure of imminent deadlines. I will present an offer that slightly reduces utility in less important areas (issueD, issueE) to signal openness while keeping high-utility choices in more critical issues (issueA, issueB, issueC).
